description:
A congressional policy analyst needs to catalog a legislative bill in their Jurism reference library. Create a new item of type 'Bill' for the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act of 2021 with the following metadata:

- Title: John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act of 2021
- Bill Number: H.R.4
- Sponsor (Creator, role 'Sponsor'): Jackson Lee, Sheila
- Legislative Body: U.S. House of Representatives
- Session: 117th Congress
- Date: 2021-08-17
- Abstract: A bill to amend the Voting Rights Act of 1965 to revise the criteria for determining which States and political subdivisions are subject to section 4 of the Act, and for other purposes. Passed the House on August 24, 2021.
- URL: https://www.congress.gov/bill/117th-congress/house-bill/4

metadata.expected_title: John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act of 2021
